channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump administration to end Minnesota immigration crackdown
item.description: The Trump administration will end its immigration crackdown in the Twin Cities, White House border czar Tom Homan announced Thursday. Why it matters: ...

item.title: A year into Trump's term, voters say Biden was better
item.description: President Trump has become so politically toxic that voters now say Joe Biden — whose unpopularity forced him into early retirement — did a better job...

item.title: The existential AI threat is here — and some AI leaders are fleeing
item.description: Top AI experts at OpenAI, Anthropic and other companies warn of rising dangers of their technology, with some quitting in protest or going public with...

item.title: Scoop: Democrats are eyeing protests at Trump's State of the Union address
item.description: Some House Democrats say they plan to defy instructions from House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries (D-N.Y.) not to protest President Trump during his ...

item.title: Greenhouse gas emissions will keep falling despite Trump's climate rollback
item.description: President Trump is trying to pull the rug out from under federal climate regulation. But the U.S. economy may no longer be standing on it. Why it matt...

item.title: In rebuke, House votes to roll back Trump’s tariffs on Canada
item.description: The president could veto the measure if it reaches his desk, but the action underscores some Republican frustrations with his trade policies.

item.title: Trump allows Democratic governors at White House meeting after initial snub
item.description: Trump had initially excluded Democrats from the traditionally bipartisan meeting. However, not all Democrats were invited to a separate dinner.

item.title: What’s happening with the FBI seizure of ballots in Georgia?
item.description: Some election experts warn it could portend attempts to muddle future election results.

item.title: A little Republican rebellion against Trump only goes so far
item.description: A handful of House Republicans bucked leadership to oppose the administration’s tariff policy, but GOP senators still fear speaking out on Epstein con...

item.title: Partial government shutdown looms as ICE negotiations stall
item.description: Large swaths of the Department of Homeland Security are set to shut down Saturday unless lawmakers and the White House strike a last-minute deal.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Ex-Trump voters swung hard to Democrats over costs in NJ & VA, new research shows
item.description: Voters who backed Donald Trump in 2024 and swung to Democrats in this year's Virginia and New Jersey elections did so over economic concerns, accordin...

item.title: Vance tries to thread affordability needle in Rust Belt
item.description: The vice president fine-tunes Trump’s economic message, but he's only got so much wiggle room.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
